docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BATEMAN, JEREMY K. AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN RODNEY JENSEN,IND DBA ADVANCE DRYWALL SYSTEM
